title: draba verna var. rigidula
intro: Draba verna var. rigidula, also known as rock cress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Draba verna var. rigidula include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Draba verna var. rigidula typically include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to support the immune system and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
